name: When Direct Prediction Fails: Evidence from LLM-Based Misinformation Risk Evaluation

description: arXiv:2604.06820v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: LLMs make it increasingly easy to generate deceptive content at scale, creating a need for scalable misinformation risk evaluation based on whether readers find such content credible and are willing to share it. A natural approach is to ask an LLM these questions directly and treat the returned scores as predictions of the corresponding human...
author: Zonghuan Xu, Xiang Zheng, Yutao Wu, Xingjun Ma
